steps.title: Spot the cause-and-effect signal
steps.content: The passage establishes a clear need: to guarantee the veracity of artisanal cheese claims. The sentence after the blank describes the response: the EU established DOP status. The transition must show that the second part is a direct consequence of the problem in the first part.

steps.title: Apply the cause-and-effect logic
steps.content:
Therefore directly conveys that establishing DOP status resulted from the need to guarantee veracity — the cause-and-effect relationship this sentence requires.

Conversely, Likewise, and Regardless either introduce contrast, similarity, or dismissal rather than consequence.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
